items.name: infinite-scroll
items.title: Infinite Scroll
items.description: Seamless infinite fullscreen scroll with parallax image effects, powered by Lenis smooth scrolling and GSAP scrub animations.

items.name: image-reveal
items.title: Image Reveal
items.description: An image reveal effect using diagonal stripes masking and sliding clip-paths.

items.name: image-parallax
items.title: Image Parallax
items.description: A smooth mouse-move and scroll-driven parallax image perspective effect.

items.name: living-text
items.title: Living Text
items.description: Stretches, rotates, and pushes characters dynamically based on real-time cursor proximity.

items.name: spotlight-text
items.title: Spotlight Text
items.description: Debossed display text with a cursor-following golden spotlight clipped to glyph shapes. Auto-detects i/j ascender dots as glowing bulbs.

items.name: gravity-card-stack
items.title: Gravity Card Stack
items.description: Falling rigid body physics cards container that reacts to scroll triggers.

items.name: morphing-nav
items.title: Morphing Nav
items.description: An interactive navigation bar with liquid morphing SVG background shapes.

items.name: coverflow-carousel
items.title: Coverflow Carousel
items.description: A hardware-accelerated 3D coverflow carousel with continuous modular perspective transforms and comprehensive gesture tracking.

items.name: void-button
items.title: Void Button
items.description: Pure black button that reveals a luxury gold gradient under the cursor via a smooth radial mask.

items.name: brushed-titanium-button
items.title: Brushed Titanium Button
items.description: Machined titanium texture with anisotropic highlight sweeps and reactive spotlight illumination.

items.name: liquid-gold-button
items.title: Liquid Gold Button
items.description: Conic gradient rotating behind a frosted glass blur layer, with a 1px border that catches light only at the top.

items.name: guilloche-button
items.title: Guilloche Button
items.description: Watch dial Guilloché patterns generating Moire wave shapes under the cursor spotlight.

items.name: pixel-melt
items.title: Pixel Melt
items.description: A full-viewport pixel grid that glows and cools under cursor heat, leaving behind a slow melt trail.

items.name: breathing-grid
items.title: Breathing Grid
items.description: An orthogonal grid with a slow left-to-right traveling wave, with local brightness boost near the cursor.

items.name: floating-embers
items.title: Floating Embers
items.description: Glowing ember particles that float upward with a gentle sway, reacting subtly to cursor and scroll.

items.name: spotlight-grid
items.title: Spotlight Grid
items.description: A dark grid with decorative tech icons and a dual-layer mouse-following spotlight effect using screen and color-dodge blend modes.

items.name: lumina-wave
items.title: Lumina Wave
items.description: An atmospheric WebGL background rendering undulating wave patterns resembling an aurora, featuring interactive mouse-bending and color personalization.

items.name: metallic-form
items.title: Metallic Form
items.description: A machined-metal obsidian form container with sequential entry animations, validation overlays, and typing state signals.

items.name: pookie-form
items.title: Pookie Form
items.description: An industrial-grade registration plate form component inspired by Braun, Muji, and Dieter Rams. Features corner screws, deep inset inputs, and heavy tactile buttons.

items.name: anisotropic-knob
items.title: Anisotropic Knob
items.description: Machined metal rotary dial knob component with dynamic rotating anisotropic highlights, snapper increments, and accessibility controls.

items.name: mechanical-timer
items.title: Mechanical Timer
items.description: Machined metal tactile timer/stopwatch component with dragging physical dials, mechanical cogwheel meshes, Web Audio click synthesis ticks, and glowing segment MM:SS.CC timer displays.

items.name: laser-vault-password
items.title: Laser Vault Password
items.description: Passcode vault keypad with laser-etch cooling characters, dynamic cursor sweeps, tactile clicks, container rattles, and friction-metal creak alarms.

items.name: premium-hero
items.title: Premium Hero
items.description: Interactive Hero Section featuring floating 3D cards, typewriter search, spring CTA, and paper-notebook grid aesthetics.

items.name: dot-matrix
items.title: Dot Matrix
items.description: Highly optimized, programmable LED dot matrix display supporting Perlin noise, typewriter bitmaps, Web Audio integration, interactive cursor repelling, and custom plugin architectures.

items.name: scroll-progress
items.title: Scroll Progress
items.description: A vertical dynamic scrollbar overlay with interactive tick mark animations, dragging controls, and velocity-based stretching/glow.

items.name: scroll-path-draw
items.title: Scroll Path Draw
items.description: An animated scroll-linked SVG path drawer supporting scroll-jacked viewport locks and passive viewport animations with multiple visual variants.

items.name: now-playing-card
items.title: Now Playing Card
items.description: A Spotify-style vinyl player card powered by Last.fm API that dynamically retrieves real-time listening history with vinyl spin animations.

items.name: wheel-picker
items.title: Wheel Picker
items.description: Premium physical-feeling 3D wheel picker with momentum dragging, spring snapping, and mechanical Web Audio crown clicks.

items.name: weapon-wheel
items.title: Weapon Wheel
items.description: Premium GTA V-inspired selection wheel designed for development tools, featuring interactive SVG slices, Tabler icons, mechanical clicks, and live stats dashboards.

items.name: names-landing
items.title: Names Landing
items.description: Premium interactive names hero canvas with organic constellation, grid, and helical layouts, search filtering, and parallax depth layers.

items.name: hero
items.title: Hero Landing
items.description: Highly configurable, responsive portfolio hero landing page with technical grids and interactive pixel art decorations.

items.name: expand-on-hover
items.title: Expand On Hover
items.description: A stack of compact preview cards that smoothly expand into immersive content panels on hover, featuring physical parting animations and 3D pointer tracking.

items.name: text-shuffle
items.title: Text Shuffle
items.description: A text animation component that shuffles characters with multiple variants including cipher, scramble, and typewriter effects.

items.name: cards
items.title: Cards
items.description: A fanned deck of dark editorial cards with B&W images, prismatic top-border highlights, spring-physics animations, and an expand-on-click description reveal.

items.name: simple-card
items.title: Simple Card
items.description: A single dark editorial card with a padded B&W image, prismatic top-border highlight, Instrument Serif title pinned to the bottom, and an expand-on-click description reveal.

items.name: flickering-grid-playground
items.title: Flickering Grid Playground
items.description: An interactive cockpit controller playground for experimenting with grid sizing, gaps, flicker chance, and curated presets.

items.name: dot-pattern-playground
items.title: Dot Pattern Playground
items.description: An interactive cockpit controller playground for dynamic dot sizes, gaps, custom swatches, and interactive spotlight masking.

items.name: cards-two
items.title: Cards Two (3D Orbit Ring)
items.description: A premium spatial 3D circular card carousel that arranges cards around an invisible 3D ring with momentum dragging, snapping, reflection, lighting depth, and custom transforms.
